links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The zebra dove (Geopelia striata), also known as the barred ground dove, or barred dove, is a species of bird of the dove family, Columbidae, native to Southeast Asia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The zebra dove (Geopelia striata), also known as the barred ground dove, or barred dove, is a species of bird of the dove family, Columbidae, native to Southeast Asia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The zebra dove (Geopelia striata), also known as the barred ground dove, or barred dove, is a species of bird of the dove family, Columbidae, native to Southeast Asia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It may also be native to Borneo, Bali, Lombok, Sumbawa, and the Philippine islands. The zebra dove is popular in captivity and many populations have appeared outside its native range due to birds escaping or being deliberately released

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It can now be found in central Thailand, Laos, Borneo, Sulawesi, Hawaii (introduced in 1922), Tahiti (1950), New Caledonia, the Seychelles, the Chagos Archipelago (1960), Mauritius (before 1768), Réunion, and Saint Helena
